---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
editor: source
---

<style>
.storymaps-page {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.back-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  padding: .55rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #222;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.back-btn:hover {
  background: #e9ecef;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.storymaps-intro {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.storymaps-intro h1 {
  margin-bottom: .6rem;
}

.storymaps-intro p {
  color: #555;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.storymaps-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.storymap-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 1.2rem 1.25rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.storymap-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: .6rem;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
}

.storymap-card p {
  color: #555;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: .8rem;
}

.tag-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  margin-bottom: .9rem;
}

.tag {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: .3rem .7rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #eef4ff;
  color: #2457a6;
  font-size: .82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.storymap-link {
  display: inline-block;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #2457a6;
}

.storymap-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.note-box {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  background: #f8f9fb;
  border-left: 4px solid #2457a6;
  border-radius: 10px;
  color: #555;
}
</style>

::: {.storymaps-page}

[← Back to Projects](content.html#cartography-page){.back-btn}

::: {.storymaps-intro}
# StoryMaps

These StoryMaps are part of my micro-credential in Geospatial Data Collection, Analysis & Interpretation using GIS Technology** at Seneca Polytechnic, Canada. They show how spatial storytelling can be employed in Asset and infrastructure management, Urban planning and other real-world scenarios.

:::

::: {.storymaps-grid}

::: {.storymap-card}
### Traffic Analysis and Safety

::: {.tag-row}
[StoryMaps]{.tag}
[Traffic Analysis]{.tag}
[Road Safety]{.tag}
:::

This project analyzes infrastructure distribution and traffic patterns to improve road safety and optimize traffic flow.

[View project PDF →](storymaps/traffic_analysis.pdf){.storymap-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.storymap-card}
### Military Checkpoint Establishment

::: {.tag-row}
[StoryMaps]{.tag}
[Site Selection]{.tag}
[Strategic Planning]{.tag}
:::

This project develops GIS-based solutions for the strategic placement of military checkpoints.

[View project PDF →](storymaps/military_checkpoint.pdf){.storymap-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.storymap-card}
### Field Maps App for Spatial Data Collection

::: {.tag-row}
[StoryMaps]{.tag}
[Field Maps]{.tag}
[Spatial Data Collection]{.tag}
:::

This project demonstrates the use of the ESRI Field Maps app to collect, manage, and communicate spatial data.

[View project PDF →](storymaps/field_maps.pdf){.storymap-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.storymap-card}
### 200m Boundary Delineation

::: {.tag-row}
[StoryMaps]{.tag}
[Boundary Analysis]{.tag}
[Real Estate GIS]{.tag}
:::
  
This project defines a 200-meter jurisdiction boundary for real estate purposes.

[View project PDF →](storymaps/boundary_delineation.pdf){.storymap-link target="_blank"}
:::

:::


:::
